jsonLd.title: PGIMER is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
PGIMER, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PGIMER:
PGIMER is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
